title: The Mystery of the Zodiac Ciphers

segments.text: The Zodiac Killer sent a series of cryptic letters and ciphers.
Some of the ciphers remain unsolved to this day.
These puzzles taunted law enforcement and amateur sleuths alike.
Expert cryptographers have attempted to decode the messages.
The mystery of the ciphers adds depth to the Zodiac case.
A chilling reminder of a killer's taunts that remain unanswered.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: The Zodiac Killer's ciphers remain unsolved, challenging experts and amateurs alike. Follow for daily cold cases! 🗝️
